label: Fortune floppy
summary: Shows an old-web fortune; click for another.
era: The fortune cookie of the command line, pinned to a homepage.

classes.name: rs-fortune__quote
classes.role: the current fortune line, added by the widget

options.name: list
options.note: custom fortunes via an inline application/json block, not a data attribute

a11y: Plain text and a real button. The pick is seeded off the clock, so no Math.random.
